name: Gordon, Gino and Fred's Road Trip
original_name: Gordon, Gino and Fred's Road Trip
overview: Three big egos, one small van. Gordon, Gino and Fred pack up their camper van once again and head off on a European adventure, but this time it's personal as each episode takes us on a tour of their cherished homelands. With three countries, three weeks and three coqs au vin in close confinement what could possibly go wrong?

trailers.title: Gordon, Gino and Fred's Road Trip | Thursday 11th October | ITV
